Short CV

Aslı Zeynep SİPAHİ completed her undergraduate education in Health Sciences University, Department of Nursing in 2017. She completed her master's degree in Health Sciences University, Department of Psychiatric Nursing in 2020. She continues her doctoral education in the Department of Psychiatric Nursing, University of Health Sciences. Aslı Zeynep SİPAHİ is a lecturer at Üsküdar University, Faculty of Health Sciences, Department of Nursing.
